channel.title: SparkFit Blog
channel.description: Fitness, workouts and simple nutrition from SparkFit.

item.title: 15-Minute Strength Workouts for Busy Schedules: Fast, Effective Training You Can Stick To
item.description: Short on time? Discover how to build muscle and strength with 15-minute strength workouts designed for busy adults. No gym required—just efficient routines, smart equipment, and science-backed strategies.
